name: Microsoft Binary Github Communication
notes:
This rule detects an executable in the Windows folder accessing github.com.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Michael Haag (idea), Florian Roth (rule)
SIGMA Title: Microsoft Binary Github Communication
SIGMA Description: Detects an executable in the Windows folder accessing github.com


Confidence: HIGH

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following Access.ACL Permit
when the event matches Initiated (custom) is any of true
when the event matches Destination Hostname (custom) contains any of [github.com or githubusercontent.com]
when the event matches Process Path (custom) contains any of C:\Windows
TD_list: APPLY Microsoft Binary Github Communication on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Access.ACL Permit
AND when the event matches Initiated (custom) is any of true
AND when the event matches Destination Hostname (custom) contains any of [github.com or githubusercontent.com]
AND when the event matches Process Path (custom) contains any of C:\Windows
RED_list: Event name: Microsoft Binary Github Communication
Event description: Detects an executable in the Windows folder accessing github.com
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
